Object.entries(channels).map(([c, v]) => `  ${c}:
    subscribe:
      summary: ${JSON.stringify(v.subscribe.summary)}
      description: ${JSON.stringify(v.subscribe.description)}
      message:
        contentType: application/json
        payload:
          type: object
    publish:
      summary: ${JSON.stringify(v.publish.summary)}
      description: ${JSON.stringify(v.publish.description)}
      message:
        contentType: application/json
        payload:
          type: object`).join

Object.entries(paths).map(([p, v]) => `  '${p}':
    get:
      summary: ${JSON.stringify(v.get.summary)}
      description: ${JSON.stringify(v.get.description)}
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Capability description
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object`).join
